headline: Exploring 3 High Growth Tech Stocks In The US Market
summary: Over the last 7 days, the United States market has remained flat, yet it is up 26% over the past year with earnings expected to grow by 16% per annum over the next few years. In this context, identifying high growth tech stocks involves looking for companies that demonstrate robust innovation and strong potential to capitalize on future market trends.

headline: Top Growth Companies With Insider Ownership In June 2026
summary: The United States market remained flat over the last week but has seen a robust 26% increase over the past year, with earnings expected to grow by 16% annually. In such an environment, growth companies with high insider ownership can be particularly attractive as they often indicate strong internal confidence and alignment of interests between management and shareholders.

headline: Unity and AppLovin stocks jump on Edgewater upgrade & ad pivot
summary: Shares of Unity Software and AppLovin climbed in recent trading, advancing 5% and 3% respectively, following a sweeping sector upgrade by Edgewater Research. Analyst Joe Wittine raised his rating on both mobile-advertising giants to Outperform, citing a noticeable industry pivot toward ad-supported monetization that is reshaping the mobile gaming ecosystem and alleviating long-standing investor concerns. The Ad-Supported Pivot The core driver of the upgrades is a validated channel shift toward I

headline: Merlin, Concrete Pumping Holdings, And Krispy Kreme And Other Big Stocks Moving Higher On Friday
summary: U.S. stocks trade lower on Friday, Nasdaq down 425 points. Merlin shares rise 35.93% after successful CDR, other big stocks also record gains.
